gap_summaries.title: JUnit XML stale data contamination across burn-in runs
gap_summaries.description: Burn-in runs could accumulate JUnit XML results from prior iterations, inflating pass/fail counts. Fixed by recording run_start timestamp and filtering JUnit files by mtime freshness.
gap_summaries.fix: Added time import, run_start = time.time() before subprocess, _mtime_safe() helper, filter JUnit files by mtime >= run_start with fallback to all files.

gap_summaries.title: Non-deterministic directory walk order in hard_wait_check
gap_summaries.description: os.walk does not guarantee directory order, causing non-deterministic output across platforms. Fixed by sorting dirs in-place.
gap_summaries.fix: Added dirs.sort() in scan_directory for deterministic walk order.

gap_summaries.title: Missing checkout directory validation in burn_in_check
gap_summaries.description: No validation that the checkout argument is a real directory before proceeding.
gap_summaries.fix: Added os.path.isdir check with stderr message and exit(2) on failure.

gap_summaries.title: Missing checkout directory validation in hard_wait_check
gap_summaries.description: No validation that the checkout argument is a real directory before proceeding.
gap_summaries.fix: Added os.path.isdir check with stderr message and exit(2) on failure.

gap_summaries.title: Missing checkout directory validation in mutation_check
gap_summaries.description: No validation that the checkout argument is a real directory before proceeding.
gap_summaries.fix: Added os.path.isdir check with stderr message and exit(2) on failure.

gap_summaries.title: Missing checkout directory validation in test_review_check
gap_summaries.description: No validation that the checkout argument is a real directory before proceeding.
gap_summaries.fix: Added os.path.isdir check with stderr message and exit(2) on failure.

gap_summaries.title: Missing §8-M2: TEA ATDD verify RED check
gap_summaries.description: Spec §8-M2 requires TEA ATDD verify RED integration. Not implemented in initial milestone.
gap_summaries.fix: Created atdd_check.py: searches .tea/atdd-result.json paths, validates red_verified field, graceful degradation when absent. Registered as ATDD_RED collector in test_quality.py.

gap_summaries.title: Missing §8-M2: BMAD dev-story TDD loop
gap_summaries.description: Spec §8-M2 requires TDD loop integration for RED/GREEN/REFACTOR phases. Not implemented in initial milestone.
gap_summaries.fix: Created tdd_loop.py: supports RED (tests must fail), GREEN (tests must pass), REFACTOR (tests must pass) phases. Runs test command via subprocess, validates phase-appropriate exit code.

gap_summaries.title: Missing §8-M2: DoD verifier
gap_summaries.description: Spec §8-M2 requires Definition of Done verifier. Not implemented in initial milestone.
gap_summaries.fix: Created dod_check.py: checks story.md for File List (present + non-empty), Change Log section, Status section. Registered as DOD collector in test_quality.py.

gap_summaries.title: Missing §8-M5: Selective execution
gap_summaries.description: Spec §8-M5 requires selective test execution based on changed files. Not implemented in initial milestone.
gap_summaries.fix: Added _select_test_files() function and --changed-files CLI arg to burn_in_check.py. Maps changed source files to test files via convention-based patterns and filesystem search.

gap_summaries.title: Missing §8-M5: Tekton CI pipeline definition
gap_summaries.description: Spec §8-M5 requires Tekton CI pipeline emission. Not implemented in initial milestone.
gap_summaries.fix: Created tekton_emit.py: reads collector definitions from JSON, generates Tekton PipelineRun YAML with one task per collector. Outputs to stdout or file.

gap_summaries.title: Missing §12: TEA gate-decision.json evidence
gap_summaries.description: Spec §12 requires composing TEA gate-decision.json as evidence. Not implemented in initial milestone.
gap_summaries.fix: Created tea_gate_check.py: searches standard TEA paths for gate-decision.json, extracts overall/categories/evidence_hash, graceful degradation when absent. Registered as TEA_GATE collector in test_quality.py.

gap_summaries.title: Missing §12: consult-fragments + confidence-gate preambles
gap_summaries.description: Spec §12 requires consult-fragment discovery and confidence-gate preamble generation. Not implemented in initial milestone.
gap_summaries.fix: Created consult_preamble.py: searches .tea/fragments/, docs/tea/, _bmad/fragments/ for known fragment files. Generates preamble with confidence gate scoring directive and fragment references.
